title: Editor toolbar component with history, undo/redo, zoom, and overflow menu
purpose: Provides a standardized toolbar for editing interfaces with item name display, undo/redo controls, zoom functionality, history navigation, and overflow menu for additional actions.
module_context: Exports a React functional component EditorToolbar that accepts various props for different editing contexts including documents, diagrams, and designs. Handles click outside and escape key events for overflow menu closing.

steps.content: Initialize state for overflow menu visibility.
Set up event listeners for click outside and escape key to close overflow menu.
Define callback for toggling overflow menu visibility.
Define callback for handling action clicks in overflow menu.
Define callback for formatting timestamp to relative time.
Build combined actions list with dynamic buttons based on item type and permissions.
Render history viewing banner when historyDiff is provided.
Render main toolbar with history controls, item name, zoom controls, and overflow menu.
Check if the clicked target is outside the overflow menu element.
IF the click is outside, close the overflow menu.
Listen for escape key press events.
IF escape key is pressed, close the overflow menu.
Toggle the visibility state of the overflow menu.
Execute the click handler of the selected action.
Close the overflow menu after action execution.
Calculate the time difference between now and the provided timestamp.
Format the time difference into a human-readable relative time string.
Start with the provided overflow actions.
Add export as SVG action if export is enabled and SVG export callback exists.
Add export as PNG action if export is enabled and PNG export callback exists.
Add format diagram action if format is enabled for diagrams.
Add copy snippet action if item is a snippet.
Add comment, approve all, reject all, and clear proposals actions if proposals are managed.
